title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Below Required
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows limited support pop-up when newly released device is connected to an older app version that does not support it
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device running an older version that does not yet support the newly released device.
2. Ensure the current date is after the newly released device's official launch date.
3. Connect the newly released device to the app.
4. Observe the connection status icon on the Home screen.
5. Tap the "i" icon displayed in the top right corner of the Home screen.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The connection status icon shows a green ring and an \"i\" icon appears in the top right corner. Tapping the \"i\" icon displays a pop-up message: \"Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality.\" Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
